name: agent-engineering-harness
purpose: Repo-local operating harness for AI coding agents, independent of ChatGPT Skills.
hard_gates: No route classification -> no workflow action.
No project context intake -> no project-specific implementation, validation, or release claim.
No Implementation File Plan -> no coding.
No plan-quality review -> no non-trivial coding.
No L2+ role-applicability scan and pre-code role simulation -> no coding.
No post-validation product-quality role review -> no L2+ done.
No component responsibility table -> no UI coding.
No browser interaction and screenshot-review evidence -> no UI/browser pass.
No validation evidence -> do not claim pass.
No explicit user request -> do not commit or push.
project_type_format: single type or comma-separated combination such as ui,backend

validation_strategy.template_schema: add --allow-template-placeholders only for blank template/schema checks, never for release approval

install_note: Installer copies only the harness core plus project-playbook files selected by mode, runtime, project-type, and phase. Existing files are skipped unless --force is used.

browser_test_pack.normal_mode_requirement: player/user mode must be clean before player-facing pass
browser_test_pack.web3d_evidence_command: PROJECT_TYPE=game,web3d node scripts/browser-evidence.mjs --url http://localhost:3000 --project-type game,web3d --debug-url http://localhost:3000?debug=1
browser_test_pack.interaction_gate: real Chromium + mouse/keyboard/touch actions + component screenshots + screenshot review + human-level composition/role simulation + design comparison when available
